title: Blackmoor 65569 60pcs Paper Air Fryer Liners/Non-Stick Parchment Paper/Multipurpose for Other Cooker Types Inc. Steamers, Microwaves and Ovens / 22 x 14 cm
features: AIR FRYER LINERS – This pack of 60 paper liners are made from parchment paper and are sized at 22 x 14 cm. They effectively keep food residue away from your air fryer to keep it clean between uses and their porous nature allows for air circulation, helping to achieve crisp and evenly cooked food.

DURABLE – The heavy-duty liners are non-stick and eliminate the need for cooking oil or sprays, promoting healthier cooking options. They can be used for a wide range of foods, including meats, vegetables, and baked goods, and can withstand a maximum temperature of 220°C.

EASY TO USE – The non-stick liners can be placed directly into the air fryer and do not need to be torn, bent, cut, or folded before use. Compared with silicone air fryer liners, air fryer paper liners are more convenient and make it easier to transfer food to your plate.

WIDE APPLICATION – The liners are suitable to use in air fryers, steamers, microwaves, and ovens. The liners can extend the lifespan of your air fryer as they prevent spills and splatters sticking to the bottom and sides of the basket.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Air Fryer Accessories Give your air fryer an upgrade with these accessories from Blackmoor. Choose between durable silicone or convenient paper air fryer liners to prevent food from sticking to the basket, making clean-up quick & easy while protecting your air fryer basket. The air fryer rack is designed to help you cook multiple items at once, making the most of your air fryer's capacity. By layering foods, you can prepare different items simultaneously, reducing cooking time & increasing efficiency in the kitchen. Paper Liners Their porous nature allows for air circulation, helping to achieve crisp and evenly cooked food. Flat Paper Liners Convenient and non-stick for easy clean up. Flat Silicone Liners Compact and flexible, making them easy to store away in between uses.
